title: Confused Bunny (Tuesday?!)
summary: Relatable mid-week meme: a fluffy bunny with one ear flopped, head tilted in confusion.
prompt: A wholesome meme: a fluffy gray bunny tilted its head to the side with one ear flopping, big curious eyes, soft cream background. Bold white meme-text top caption with black outline: "WAIT... IT'S ONLY TUESDAY?" Photo-realistic rabbit, friendly relatable humor, no negativity. Square 1:1 format.
